records.jp_source: タイトルを設定してください
records.en_reference: Title
records.asset_en: Title
records.vi_output: Tiêu Đề

records.jp_source:
宿舎――大穴探索に挑む者たちにあてがわれた宿泊施設。
前線基地の憩いの空間であるその場所で、３人の少女が向かい合っていた。
records.en_reference:
The dormitory——lodging assigned to those who brave the Abyss. In
that space of respite within the forward base, three girls sat facing one another.
records.asset_en:
The dormitory——lodging assigned to those who brave the Abyss. In
that space of respite within the forward base，three girls sat facing one another.
records.vi_output:
Ký túc xá――nơi lưu trú được cấp cho những người dấn thân khám phá Đại Huyệt. Trong
không gian nghỉ ngơi ở căn cứ tiền tuyến ấy‚ ba cô gái đang ngồi đối diện nhau.

records.speaker: ウェンディ
records.jp_source:
――というわけで、司令官の着任をお祝いする
サプライズパーティーを開きたいんです！！
records.en_reference:
And so, I want to throw a surprise party
to celebrate the Commander's appointment!!
records.asset_en:
And so，I want to throw a surprise party
to celebrate the Commander's appointment!!
records.vi_output:
Vậy nên em muốn tổ chức một bữa tiệc bất ngờ
để chúc mừng Chỉ Huy nhậm chức!!

records.speaker: ヴィーラ
records.jp_source:
それは、とっても素敵ですね。
ねっ、お姉ちゃん。
records.en_reference:
That sounds absolutely wonderful.
Right, Onee-chan?
records.asset_en:
That sounds absolutely wonderful.
Right，Onee-chan?
records.vi_output:
Nghe thật tuyệt vời.
Phải không chị?

records.speaker: ベリサ
records.jp_source:
そうねぇ～♪
今さらっていう気もするけど、ま、いいんじゃな～い？
records.en_reference:
Yeah~♪
It feels a bit late for that, but hey, why not~?
records.asset_en:
Yeah~♪
It feels a bit late for that，but hey，why not~?
records.vi_output:
Ừ nhỉ~♪
Cũng hơi muộn rồi đấy‚ nhưng thôi‚ cũng được mà~?

records.jp_source:
ウェンディの言葉に頷いたのは、ペルディオンの魔法使い姉妹。
氷の魔法使いヴィーラと、彼女の姉であり炎の魔法使いであるベリサだ。
records.en_reference:
The ones who nodded at Wendy's words were the mage sisters of
Perdion—— the ice mage Veera, and her elder sister, the fire mage Verisa.
records.asset_en:
The ones who nodded at Wendy's words were the mage sisters of
Perdion—— the ice mage Veera，and her elder sister，the fire mage Verisa.
records.vi_output:
Những người gật đầu trước lời Wendy là cặp chị em pháp sư của
Perdion――pháp sư băng Veera và chị cô ấy‚ pháp sư lửa Verisa.

records.jp_source:
レアな鉱石を探す姉妹の案内人を務めて以来、
彼女たちはウェンディにとって心を許せる数少ない友人だった。
records.en_reference:
Ever since she served as their guide while they searched for rare
ores, the sisters had become some of the few friends Wendy truly felt at ease with.
records.asset_en:
Ever since she served as their guide while they searched for rare
ores， the sisters had become some of the few friends Wendy truly felt at ease with.
records.vi_output:
Từ sau khi làm người dẫn đường cho hai chị em đi tìm
quặng hiếm‚ họ đã trở thành số ít bạn bè mà Wendy có thể thật sự mở lòng.

records.speaker: ヴィーラ
records.jp_source:
あれ？　そういえば、わたしとお姉ちゃんの再会パーティーも
やってないよね？　そっちも開催した方が……
records.en_reference:
Huh? Come to think of it, we never had a reunion party
for me and Onee-chan either, did we? Maybe we should hold one...
records.asset_en:
Huh? Come to think of it，we never had a reunion party
for me and Onee-chan either，did we? Maybe we should hold one...
records.vi_output:
Hửm? Nghĩ lại thì bữa tiệc mừng em với chị gặp lại nhau
cũng chưa làm nhỉ? Hay là mình tổ chức cả bên đó nữa...

records.speaker: ベリサ
records.jp_source:
そんなのいらない～～！
そこまで長く離れてたわけでもないでしょ～？
records.en_reference:
We don't need that~~!
It's not like we were apart that long~?
records.asset_en:
We don't need that~~!
It's not like we were apart that long~?
records.vi_output:
Không cần đâu~~!
Đâu phải mình xa nhau lâu đến thế đâu~?

records.jp_source:
姉とは桁違いに強力な氷の魔法を操るヴィーラだが、
ベリサのことは心から慕っている。
records.en_reference:
Though Veera wields ice magic leagues beyond her sister's power,
she adores Verisa from the bottom of her heart.
records.asset_en:
Though Veera wields ice magic leagues beyond her sister's power，
she adores Verisa from the bottom of her heart.
records.vi_output:
Veera điều khiển ma pháp băng mạnh hơn chị mình nhiều bậc
nhưng cô vẫn yêu quý Verisa từ tận đáy lòng.

records.jp_source:
前線基地に来た当初は人見知りで落ち着きすぎていたが、最近は表情が豊かに
なってきたヴィーラ。そんな妹の前では、姉らしく振舞おうとするベリサ。
records.en_reference:
When Veera first arrived, she was shy and reserved, but lately she's
livelier. Seeing that, Verisa tries to act the proper big sis.
records.asset_en:
When Veera first arrived，she was shy and reserved， but lately she's
livelier. Seeing that，Verisa tries to act the proper big sis.
records.vi_output:
Khi mới đến căn cứ tiền tuyến‚ Veera nhút nhát và điềm tĩnh quá mức
nhưng gần đây biểu cảm đã phong phú hơn. Trước cô em gái ấy‚ Verisa luôn cố tỏ ra ra dáng chị gái.

records.jp_source:
デコボコながらも仲の良い姉妹のやり取りが、
ウェンディは大好きだった。
records.en_reference:
Wendy loved watching the sisters' mismatched yet close-knit
exchanges.
records.asset_en:
Wendy loved watching the sisters' mismatched yet close-knit
exchanges.
records.vi_output:
Wendy rất thích những màn qua lại vụng về mà thân thiết
của cặp chị em này.

records.speaker: ヴィーラ
records.jp_source:
まあ、お姉ちゃんとの再会パーティーは後日考えるとして……
司令官さまのお祝いをサプライズにするという案は素晴らしいと思います。
records.en_reference:
Well, the reunion party with Onee-chan can wait for another day... I
think the idea of making Commander-sama's celebration a surprise is wonderful.
records.asset_en:
Well，the reunion party with Onee-chan can wait for another day... I
think the idea of making Commander-sama's celebration a surprise is wonderful.
records.vi_output:
Ừm‚ bữa tiệc tái ngộ với chị để sau hãy tính...
Em nghĩ ý tưởng làm tiệc mừng ngài Chỉ Huy thành bất ngờ rất tuyệt.

records.speaker: ヴィーラ
records.jp_source:
司令官さまを普通のパーティーに招待しても、
理由をつけて断りそうですし……ふふ。
records.en_reference:
If we just invited Commander-sama to a normal party,
he'd probably come up with some excuse to decline... Hehe.
records.asset_en:
If we just invited Commander-sama to a normal party，
he'd probably come up with some excuse to decline... Hehe.
records.vi_output:
Nếu chỉ mời ngài Chỉ Huy đến một bữa tiệc bình thường
chắc anh ấy sẽ viện lý do để từ chối mất... Hì hì.

records.speaker: ベリサ
records.jp_source:
いっつもすました顔してるおにーさんが、どんな顔で喜ぶかぁ……。
ふふっ、これは見ものね～♪　いいアイデアね、ウェンディ。
records.en_reference:
I wonder what kind of face Onii-san will make, always acting so
composed... Hehe, this'll be a sight to see~♪ Nice idea, Wendy.
records.asset_en:
I wonder what kind of face Onii-san will make，always acting so
composed... Hehe，this'll be a sight to see~♪ Nice idea，Wendy.
records.vi_output:
Không biết anh Chỉ Huy lúc nào cũng làm mặt tỉnh bơ kia sẽ vui vẻ thế nào đây...
Hì hì‚ đáng xem lắm đó~♪ Ý hay đấy Wendy.

records.speaker: ウェンディ
records.jp_source:
いえいえ。実は、サプライズは兵士さんたちのアイデアなんです。
やっぱり皆さん、司令官を慕ってるんですね……
records.en_reference:
Oh no, not at all. The surprise was actually the soldiers' idea.
Everyone really does look up to the Commander...
records.asset_en:
Oh no，not at all. The surprise was actually the soldiers' idea.
Everyone really does look up to the Commander...
records.vi_output:
Không không. Thật ra chuyện bất ngờ này là ý tưởng của các anh lính.
Quả nhiên mọi người đều kính mến Chỉ Huy nhỉ...

records.speaker: ウェンディ
records.jp_source:
わたしも負けてられません！　とりあえず、尊敬と感謝の気持ちを込めて、
パーティーは三日三晩――いえ、一週間連続で開催しようかと思っています！
records.en_reference:
I can't let them outdo me! So, to show my respect and gratitude, I'm
thinking the party should last three days and nights——no, a whole week straight!
records.asset_en:
I can't let them outdo me! So，to show my respect and gratitude， I'm
thinking the party should last three days and nights——no，a whole week straight!
records.vi_output:
Em cũng không thể chịu thua được! Trước mắt‚ để gửi gắm lòng kính trọng và biết ơn
em định tổ chức tiệc suốt ba ngày ba đêm――không‚ suốt một tuần liền!

records.speaker: ヴィーラ
records.jp_source: 基地の機能が止まっちゃう！！
records.en_reference: The whole base would shut down!!
records.asset_en: The whole base would shut down!!
records.vi_output: Chức năng căn cứ sẽ tê liệt mất!!

records.speaker: ヴィーラ
records.jp_source:
お、落ち着いてくださいウェンディさん。
司令官さまを尊敬する気持ちはわかましたから、ね？
records.en_reference:
P-please calm down, Wendy-san.
We understand how much you respect Commander-sama, okay?
records.asset_en:
P-please calm down，Wendy-san.
We understand how much you respect Commander-sama，okay?
records.vi_output:
B-bình tĩnh nào Wendy-san.
Bọn em hiểu chị kính trọng ngài Chỉ Huy đến mức nào rồi mà‚ nhé?

records.speaker: ウェンディ
records.jp_source:
はい、とっても尊敬しています！
今の幸せな毎日も司令官のおかげなので、この機会に恩返ししないと……！
records.en_reference:
Yes, I respect him so very much! My happy days are all thanks to the
Commander, so I have to repay him...!
records.asset_en:
Yes，I respect him so very much! My happy days are all thanks to the
Commander，so I have to repay him...!
records.vi_output:
Vâng‚ em vô cùng kính trọng anh ấy! Những ngày hạnh phúc hiện giờ đều nhờ có
Chỉ Huy‚ nên nhân dịp này em phải báo đáp...!

records.speaker: ベリサ
records.jp_source:
ふーん……ウェンディの気持ちはよく分かったけどぉ……
どうして、あたしたちにパーティーのことを話したの～？
records.en_reference:
Hmm... I get how you feel and all, but...
why did you tell us about the party~?
records.asset_en:
Hmm... I get how you feel and all，but...
why did you tell us about the party~?
records.vi_output:
Hừm... chị hiểu tâm ý của Wendy rồi đó...
nhưng sao em lại kể chuyện bữa tiệc cho bọn chị~?

records.speaker: ウェンディ
records.jp_source:
あ……もしよかったら、おふたりにも……
手伝ってほしいなって……だめ、ですか……？
records.en_reference:
Oh... if it's okay with you, I was hoping you two could...
help me out... is that... no good...?
records.asset_en:
Oh... if it's okay with you，I was hoping you two could...
help me out... is that... no good...?
records.vi_output:
À... nếu hai chị không phiền...
em muốn nhờ hai chị giúp... có được... không ạ...?

records.speaker: ヴィーラ
records.jp_source:
司令官さまには、わたしたちも日頃お世話になってますから。
もちろん手伝わせていただきますよ。ねっ、お姉ちゃん？
records.en_reference:
Commander-sama has always looked after us too.
Of course we'll help. Right, Onee-chan?
records.asset_en:
Commander-sama has always looked after us too.
Of course we'll help. Right，Onee-chan?
records.vi_output:
Ngài Chỉ Huy cũng luôn quan tâm đến bọn em mà.
Tất nhiên là bọn em sẽ giúp. Phải không chị?

records.speaker: ベリサ
records.jp_source:
どっちかっていうと、あたしが世話を焼いてる方だけどね～♪
ま、いいよ。手伝ってあげる――
records.en_reference:
If anything, I'm the one looking after him though~♪
Well, fine. I'll help you out——
records.asset_en:
If anything，I'm the one looking after him though~♪
Well，fine. I'll help you out——
records.vi_output:
Nói đúng hơn thì chị mới là người chăm sóc anh ấy ấy chứ~♪
Thôi được. Chị sẽ giúp em――

records.speaker: ベリサ
records.jp_source:
と、言いたいところだけどぉ～。ふふっ。せっかく驚かせるなら、
パーティーなんかよりも、ドッキリの方がよくなーい？
records.en_reference:
——is what I'd like to say, but~ hehe. If we're gonna surprise him
anyway, wouldn't a prank be way better than some party~?
records.asset_en:
——is what I'd like to say，but~ hehe. If we're gonna surprise him
anyway， wouldn't a prank be way better than some party~?
records.vi_output:
――chị muốn nói vậy lắm nhưng mà~ hì hì. Đã định làm anh ấy bất ngờ
thì chơi khăm chẳng phải thú vị hơn tiệc tùng sao~?

records.speaker: ウェンディ
records.jp_source:
ドッキリ……！？　なんですか、それ！？
司令官を楽しませられるなら、なんでもやりますっ！　教えてください！
records.en_reference:
A prank...!? What's that!?
If it'll make the Commander happy, I'll do anything! Tell me more!
records.asset_en:
A prank...!? What's that!?
If it'll make the Commander happy，I'll do anything! Tell me more!
records.vi_output:
Chơi khăm...!? Là gì vậy ạ!?
Nếu có thể làm Chỉ Huy vui thì em làm gì cũng được! Xin hãy chỉ em!

records.speaker: ベリサ
records.jp_source:
いい覚悟じゃん♪
ならまずはアーデルハイトから、カメラってやつを借りてくるのぉ♪
records.en_reference:
Now that's the spirit♪
First, go borrow a thing called a camera from Adelheid♪
records.asset_en:
Now that's the spirit♪
First，go borrow a thing called a camera from Adelheid♪
records.vi_output:
Tinh thần tốt đấy♪
Vậy trước hết hãy đi mượn Adelheid cái gọi là máy ảnh đi♪

records.speaker: ウェンディ
records.jp_source:
カメラ……確か、目の前の光景を写し取れる機械、ですよね？
それでどんな場面を撮ってくればいいんでしょう！
records.en_reference:
A camera... that's the machine that captures the scene before you,
right? So what kind of scene should I photograph!?
records.asset_en:
A camera... that's the machine that captures the scene before you，
right? So what kind of scene should I photograph!?
records.vi_output:
Máy ảnh... hình như là cỗ máy ghi lại cảnh trước mắt đúng không ạ?
Vậy em nên chụp cảnh như thế nào đây ạ!?

records.speaker: ベリサ
records.jp_source:
ふふふ……それはねぇ～、おにーさんのなさけな～～い姿！
これを脅しに使って下僕にしちゃえば、絶対にビックリするでしょっ♪
records.en_reference:
Hehehe... that would be~~ Onii-san's most pathetic~~ look! If we use
it as blackmail to make him our servant, he'll definitely be shocked♪
records.asset_en:
Hehehe... that would be~~ Onii-san's most pathetic~~ look! If we use
it as blackmail to make him our servant，he'll definitely be shocked♪
records.vi_output:
Hì hì hì... đó là~~ dáng vẻ thảm hại~~ của anh Chỉ Huy!
Nếu dùng nó để uy hiếp rồi biến anh ấy thành đầy tớ thì chắc chắn anh ấy sẽ sốc lắm♪

records.speaker: ウェンディ
records.jp_source:
お、思ってたのと違いましたぁ～～！
わたしは司令官に『喜んで』欲しいんですよ～～！
records.en_reference:
Th-that's not what I had in mind at all~~!
I want the Commander to be 'happy'~~!
records.asset_en:
Th-that's not what I had in mind at all~~!
I want the Commander to be 'happy'~~!
records.vi_output:
K-khác hẳn điều em tưởng tượng luôn~~!
Em muốn Chỉ Huy phải “vui vẻ” cơ mà~~!

records.speaker: ヴィーラ
records.jp_source:
そうだよ、お姉ちゃん……。
それに、失敗する未来しか見えないと言うか、なんと言うか……
records.en_reference:
She's right, Onee-chan...
Besides, I can only see that ending in failure, how should I put it...
records.asset_en:
She's right，Onee-chan...
Besides，I can only see that ending in failure，how should I put it...
records.vi_output:
Đúng đó chị...
Hơn nữa em chỉ thấy trước tương lai thất bại thôi‚ phải nói sao nhỉ...

records.speaker: ベリサ
records.jp_source: ええ～？　でも、ベリサちゃんはイタズラの方が好きだしぃ～～。
records.en_reference: Ehh~? But Verisa-chan likes pranks way better~~.
records.asset_en: Ehh~? But Verisa-chan likes pranks way better~~.
records.vi_output: Ể~? Nhưng chị Verisa đây thích trò nghịch ngợm hơn mà~~.

records.speaker: ウェンディ
records.jp_source:
お願いしますベリサさん！！
どうしても司令官に感謝の気持ちを伝えたいんです～！！！
records.en_reference:
Please, Verisa-san!!
I absolutely have to show the Commander how grateful I am~!!!
records.asset_en:
Please，Verisa-san!!
I absolutely have to show the Commander how grateful I am~!!!
records.vi_output:
Xin chị đó Verisa-san!!
Em nhất định phải truyền đạt lòng biết ơn của mình đến Chỉ Huy~!!!

records.speaker: ベリサ
records.jp_source:
ぐぅぅ！！　な、なんて純粋な目なのぉ……！？
思わず頷きたくなっちゃうから、こっち見ないで～っ！
records.en_reference:
Ghhh!! Wh-what's with those pure eyes...!?
They make me want to say yes, so stop looking at me~!
records.asset_en:
Ghhh!! Wh-what's with those pure eyes...!?
They make me want to say yes，so stop looking at me~!
records.vi_output:
Ư ưư!! Á-ánh mắt thuần khiết gì thế này...!?
Nó làm chị muốn gật đầu mất nên đừng nhìn chị nữa~!

records.speaker: ウェンディ
records.jp_source:
お願いします～！　おふたりと一緒なら、
きっと素敵なパーティーにできると思うんです～！！！
records.en_reference:
Please~! If it's with you two,
I just know we can make it a wonderful party~!!!
records.asset_en:
Please~! If it's with you two，
I just know we can make it a wonderful party~!!!
records.vi_output:
Em xin hai chị~! Nếu được làm cùng hai chị
em tin chắc chúng ta sẽ tạo nên một bữa tiệc thật tuyệt~!!!

records.speaker: ベリサ
records.jp_source:
う、うう……でもでもぉ……。
ただ喜ばせるだけっていうのは……なんか照れるかも、だしぃ……。
records.en_reference:
U-ugh... but, but...
Just making someone happy is... kinda embarrassing, y'know...
records.asset_en:
U-ugh... but，but...
Just making someone happy is... kinda embarrassing，y'know...
records.vi_output:
Ư-ưư... nhưng mà nhưng mà...
Chỉ làm người ta vui thôi thì... hình như hơi xấu hổ ấy...

records.speaker: ヴィーラ
records.jp_source:
お姉ちゃんったら。いいよって言ってあげたらいいのに。
本当は司令官さまのお祝い、一緒にやりたいんでしょ？
records.en_reference:
Oh, Onee-chan. Just go ahead and say yes already.
You actually want to celebrate Commander-sama together, don't you?
records.asset_en:
Oh，Onee-chan. Just go ahead and say yes already.
You actually want to celebrate Commander-sama together，don't you?
records.vi_output:
Chị thật là. Chị cứ nói đồng ý là được mà.
Thật ra chị cũng muốn cùng mừng cho ngài Chỉ Huy đúng không?

records.speaker: ベリサ
records.jp_source:
そ、そんなわけないでしょっ！？
おにーさんに感謝とか、ちょ～～っとしてるかなってぐらいなんだから！
records.en_reference:
A-as if!?

When it comes to a party，good food is essential~.
We should be able to find fresh ingredients in this forest.
records.vi_output:
Nhắc đến tiệc thì món ngon rất quan trọng nhỉ~.
Trong khu rừng này chắc sẽ kiếm được nguyên liệu tươi đấy.

records.speaker: ベリサ
records.jp_source:
うーん……おっ、見つけたわ！
このタケノコ、まるであたしに見つけられるために生えてたみた～い♪
records.en_reference:
Hmm... oh, found one!
This bamboo shoot was practically growing here just for me to find~♪
records.asset_en:
Hmm... oh，found one!
This bamboo shoot was practically growing here just for me to find~♪
records.vi_output:
Ưm... ồ‚ tìm thấy rồi!
Măng này cứ như mọc lên để được chị tìm thấy vậy~♪

records.speaker: ベリサ
records.jp_source:
ざぁ～こ、ざぁ～～こ♪
成長途中なのにあっさり見つかって食べられちゃう、ざこざこタケノコ～～♪
records.en_reference:
Helpless~, so helpless~~♪ Still growing but found and eaten so easily,
what a helpless little shoot~~♪
records.asset_en:
Helpless~，so helpless~~♪ Still growing but found and eaten so
easily，what a helpless little shoot~~♪
records.vi_output:
Yếu xìu~ yếu xìu~~♪
Đang lớn dở mà bị tìm thấy và ăn mất dễ dàng‚ cây măng yếu xìu~~♪

records.speaker: ヴィーラ
records.jp_source: さすがです！　もうそんなにたくさん！
records.en_reference: Impressive! You've already found so many!
records.asset_en: Impressive! You've already found so many!
records.vi_output: Đúng là chị! Chị đã tìm được nhiều thế rồi!

records.speaker: ベリサ
records.jp_source:
ふっふ～ん、そうでしょ～？
あたしにかかればタケノコの１本や２本、簡単に……
records.en_reference:
Heh heh~, right~?
For me, a bamboo shoot or two is a piece of——
records.asset_en:
Heh heh~，right~?
For me，a bamboo shoot or two is a piece of——
records.vi_output:
Hừ hừ~ đúng chứ~?
Nếu là chị thì một hai cây măng chỉ là chuyện dễ như――

records.speaker: ヴィーラ
records.jp_source:
ウェンディさん、すごいです！　もうこんなにたくさん！
キノコが山のようです！
records.en_reference:
Wendy-san, that's amazing! You've already got so many!
There's a whole mountain of mushrooms!
records.asset_en:
Wendy-san，that's amazing! You've already got so many!
There's a whole mountain of mushrooms!
records.vi_output:
Wendy-san giỏi quá! Đã có nhiều thế này rồi!
Nấm chất thành cả núi luôn!

records.speaker: ベリサ
records.en_reference: ...Huh?
records.asset_en: ...Huh?
records.vi_output: ...Hả?

records.speaker: ウェンディ
records.jp_source:
２時の方向、距離２０……１１時の方向、距離３２……。
あ、ヴィーラさんの隣の木の根元にもあります！
records.en_reference:
Two o'clock, distance 20... eleven o'clock, distance 32...
Oh, there's one at the base of the tree next to Veera-san too!
records.asset_en:
Two o'clock，distance 20... eleven o'clock，distance 32...
Oh，there's one at the base of the tree next to Veera-san too!
records.vi_output:
Hướng hai giờ‚ cự ly 20... hướng mười một giờ‚ cự ly 32...
À‚ ở gốc cây cạnh Veera-san cũng có nữa!

records.speaker: ヴィーラ
records.jp_source:
本当だ……ウェンディさんの索敵能力はすごいですね。
あっという間にこんなに集まっちゃいました。
records.en_reference:
You're right... Wendy-san's detection abilities are incredible.
She gathered all of these in no time.
records.asset_en:
You're right... Wendy-san's detection abilities are incredible.
She gathered all of these in no time.
records.vi_output:
Đúng thật... năng lực dò tìm của Wendy-san tuyệt quá.
Chỉ trong chớp mắt đã gom được nhiều thế này rồi.

records.speaker: ウェンディ
records.jp_source:
えへへ、そんなに褒められると照れちゃいます～♪
オートマタなので、こういうのは得意なんですっ。
records.en_reference:
Ehehe, you're making me blush with all that praise~♪
Since I'm an automaton, I'm good at this kind of thing!
records.asset_en:
Ehehe，you're making me blush with all that praise~♪
Since I'm an automaton，I'm good at this kind of thing!
records.vi_output:

records.speaker: ベリサ
records.jp_source:
……ふ、ふーんだ。いいもん、別に……ていうか、あたしキノコより

records.en_reference:
...H-hmph. Whatever, I don't care... Besides, I prefer bamboo shoots

records.asset_en:
...H-hmph. Whatever，I don't care... Besides，I prefer bamboo shoots
over mushrooms anyway... and most of humanity agrees with me...
records.vi_output:
...H-hứ. Được thôi‚ chị không quan tâm... nói chứ chị theo phe măng

records.speaker: ヴィーラ
records.jp_source:
あっ、そ、その――お、お姉ちゃんの採ったタケノコ、すごい色つやが
綺麗だな～。形もすっごくいいし、こう……芸術的だよねっ。
records.en_reference:
Oh, w-well——Onee-chan, the bamboo shoots you picked have such

records.asset_en:
Oh，w-well——Onee-chan，the bamboo shoots you picked have such
beautiful color and luster~. The shape is really nice too，they're... artistic，right?
records.vi_output:
À‚ ừ-ừm――măng chị hái có màu sắc và độ bóng
đẹp lắm~. Hình dáng cũng rất tuyệt‚ kiểu như... rất nghệ thuật nhỉ.

records.speaker: ベリサ
records.jp_source:
無理やりフォローするな～～！

records.en_reference:
Don't force yourself to compliment me~~!
That kind of pity-kindness hurts the most~~!
records.asset_en:
Don't force yourself to compliment me~~!
That kind of pity-kindness hurts the most~~!
records.vi_output:
Đừng cố gượng khen chị~~!

records.speaker: ウェンディ
records.jp_source:
だ、大丈夫ですよ、ベリサさん！

records.en_reference:
I-it's okay, Verisa-san!
L-look, since you have fewer, they'll be less work to cook!
records.asset_en:
I-it's okay，Verisa-san!
L-look，since you have fewer，they'll be less work to cook!

records.speaker: ベリサ
records.jp_source: フォローになってなぁ～～い！
records.en_reference: That's not helping at all~~!
records.asset_en: That's not helping at all~~!
records.vi_output: Không phải an ủi chút nào hết~~!

records.jp_source:

サプライズパーティーの準備は着々と進んでいた。

Preparations for the surprise party were steadily coming along.
records.asset_en:
——A few days later.
Preparations for the surprise party were steadily coming along.

Công tác chuẩn bị cho bữa tiệc bất ngờ đang tiến triển thuận lợi.

records.speaker: ウェンディ
records.jp_source:
採取した食材は保存してるし、小道具やプレゼントも用意したし……

The ingredients we gathered are stored away, and the props and gifts

records.asset_en:
The ingredients we gathered are stored away，and the props and gifts

Someone's fired up, Wendy. You've been making decorations late into

records.asset_en:
Someone's fired up，Wendy. You've been making decorations late into
the night even after we've gone to bed. You really want Onii-san to be happy，huh~.

để làm đồ trang trí nữa. Em thật sự muốn anh Chỉ Huy vui lắm nhỉ~.

records.speaker: ヴィーラ
records.jp_source:

Yeah. Seeing her work that hard, it makes me feel like we absolutely

records.asset_en:
Yeah. Seeing her work that hard， it makes me feel like we absolutely
have to make this succeed for Wendy-san's sake.

Ừ. Thấy Wendy-san cố gắng đến vậy

records.asset_en:

I hope the Commander enjoys it~.
Hehe，I'll work even harder to make it a wonderful party!

Không biết Chỉ Huy có vui không nhỉ~.

records.speaker: ベリサ
records.jp_source:
……頑張るのはいいんだけどさ、ウェンディ。
さすがに、ちょっとがんばり過ぎじゃな～い？

...Working hard is fine and all, Wendy.

...Working hard is fine and all，Wendy.

Onii-san said it too, remember~? Even if you're an automaton,

Onii-san said it too，remember~? Even if you're an automaton，

records.speaker: ウェンディ
records.jp_source:
大丈夫ですよ！　わたし、風邪なんてひいたことありませんし！

records.en_reference:
I'm fine! I've never even caught a cold in my life! And besides, I

records.asset_en:
I'm fine! I've never even caught a cold in my life! And besides，I

records.speaker: ベリサ
records.jp_source:
はいはい、分かった分かったぁ～。

records.en_reference:
Yeah yeah, I get it, I get it~. Well, all that's left is the cooking and

records.asset_en:
Yeah yeah，I get it，I get it~. Well，all that's left is the cooking and
decorations for the day，so I guess it's fine.

Thôi‚ còn lại chỉ là nấu nướng và trang trí trong ngày đó nên chắc ổn thôi.

records.speaker: ヴィーラ
records.jp_source:
司令官さまにバレないようにしないとだから、

records.en_reference:
We have to make sure Commander-sama doesn't find out,
so we'll need to get all the decorating done while he's away.
records.asset_en:
We have to make sure Commander-sama doesn't find out，
so we'll need to get all the decorating done while he's away.
records.vi_output:
Phải làm sao để ngài Chỉ Huy không phát hiện
nên lúc anh ấy vắng mặt chúng ta phải trang trí một lượt cho xong nhỉ.

records.speaker: ベリサ
records.jp_source:
きっと驚くわよ～。帰ってきたら、宿舎が豪華に

He'll be so surprised~. Coming back to find the dorm all lavishly

records.asset_en:
He'll be so surprised~. Coming back to find the dorm all lavishly
decorated. Hehe，I can't wait to show off my skills~♪
records.vi_output:
Chắc chắn anh ấy sẽ bất ngờ lắm~. Vừa về đã thấy ký túc xá được
trang trí lộng lẫy mà. Hì hì‚ chị thấy háo hức rồi~♪

records.speaker: ウェンディ
records.jp_source:
そうだ！　ここはみんなで、えいえいおーをやって、士気を上げましょう！
兵士さんたちとよくやるんです！
records.en_reference:
Oh, I know! Let's all do a rally cry to boost morale!
The soldiers and I do it all the time!
records.asset_en:
Oh，I know! Let's all do a rally cry to boost morale!
The soldiers and I do it all the time!
records.vi_output:
Đúng rồi! Chúng ta hãy cùng hô quyết tâm để nâng cao sĩ khí nhé!
Em hay làm với các anh lính lắm!

records.speaker: ヴィーラ
records.jp_source: いいですねっ。ほら、お姉ちゃんも。
records.en_reference: That sounds great! Come on, Onee-chan, you too.
records.asset_en: That sounds great! Come on，Onee-chan，you too.
records.vi_output: Hay đấy. Nào chị cũng làm đi.

records.speaker: ベリサ
records.jp_source: はいは～い。今日は特別に付き合ってあげる♪
records.en_reference: Yeah yeah~. I'll play along just for today♪
records.asset_en: Yeah yeah~. I'll play along just for today♪
records.vi_output: Rồi rồi~. Hôm nay đặc biệt chị chiều theo vậy♪

records.asset_en: Okay then... let's make this a success for sure! Fight，fight——!

records.en_reference: PEEEEEE-GAGAGAGAGAGA!!
records.asset_en: PEEEEEE-GAGAGAGAGAGA!!
records.vi_output: Piiiiii-gagagagagagaga!!

records.speaker: ベリサ・ヴィーラ

records.en_reference: Ehhhhhh!!??
